source_metadata.title: Employee Leave and Time Off Policy
source_metadata.citation_label: Employee Leave and Time Off Policy

section_path: Employee Leave and Time Off Policy
content_blocks.text: Employee Leave and Time Off Policy

items: Full-time employees receive annual leave based on tenure band and local employment terms.
Leave requests should be submitted in advance and approved by the direct manager unless local emergency leave rules apply.
Unused leave may carry over only within the limits shown below.

content_blocks.text: Chart shows max carryover days by tenure band: 0-2 years = 5, 3-5 years = 7, 6+ years = 10.

items: Managers should balance team coverage with fair access to approved leave.
Employees should review their remaining leave balance before submitting a request.
Questions about personal leave balance should be answered only for the authenticated employee.
